goal: Post-clearance macOS runtime rehearsal for PR #903 without executing runtime now

win_condition.statement: Static authorities and immutable PR/base/head/governed dependency scope are exact and supersession is resolved
Every future runtime command has platform/shell/executable/target/order/exit/output-hash receipt binding
First launch, relaunch, clean profile, failure/offline, UI/accessibility and cleanup scenarios have fail-closed acceptance
18-move graph is acyclic/reachable and every L1-L3 action is dominated by explicit Phill gates
PR approval, signing, notarisation, publication, merge and deployment remain detached and non-automatic

supersession.attachment_1098: superseded due to eight-byte prose typo; never canonical

scenarios.name: DMG build and integrity
scenarios.accept: one exact unsigned arm64 DMG/app/executable; integrity and ownership proven

scenarios.name: first launch
scenarios.accept: unique owned PID, loopback readiness <=45s, route probes pass

scenarios.name: relaunch
scenarios.accept: new PID and fresh receipts; no stale state

scenarios.name: clean profile
scenarios.accept: run-owned profile only; no writes outside run root

scenarios.name: offline and failure paths
scenarios.accept: safe degraded UI/controlled 503/no secret leak; network state restored

scenarios.name: gateway observation and operator accessibility
scenarios.accept: read-only gateway receipts plus keyboard/AX/visual acceptance

scenarios.name: operability cleanup and review
scenarios.accept: no owned resources remain; envelope validates; non-author verdict recorded

moves.title: Exercise offline, unavailable-gateway and no-secret-leak failure paths
moves.deliverable: M14 command and evidence receipt set
moves.verify: C14A captures the gate-approved sole external/default-route interface and exact pre-state. C14B proves transport success plus exact HTTP 503 headers/body. C14C proves approved-interface isolation, absence of all non-loopback external routes and the frozen transport-failure class without relabelling HTTP 000. C14D always restores the exact captured state from a finally path and hash-compares every field.

commands.target: gate-approved interface and complete network pre-state
commands.capture: separate exact fields plus canonical pre_state_sha256; block unless interface is sole external/default-route path
process exit, transport outcome, HTTP status, headers and body separately; require status 503 and exact frozen error schema
route absence, offline UI predicate and transport failure separately; HTTP 000 is never 503

commands.target: exact captured network state finally-path restoration
commands.capture: success/failure/timeout/interruption cleanup receipt; mismatch is BLOCKED_ROLLBACK_FAILED and forbids later moves

failure.cleanup_scope: run-owned resources only; preserve unrelated processes, mounts, profiles and files

C14A.block_if: selected interface is not the sole external and default-route path

pass: body exactly matches frozen error schema
transport outcome equals frozen failure class

red_team.response: M07-M10 bind source manifest, one contained DMG/app, hashes, architecture and receipt chain
M16 binds run_id, state, route, capture time, viewport and prior receipt; M18 rejects missing scenarios
desired-state predicates are separate from process exit and output hashes
M12/M17 require PID start identity, executable hash and owner marker before signalling
M14/M17 require zero secret-scan matches and redacted derivatives while preserving raw hashes securely
pre-state receipt and restoration command are mandatory; failure becomes BLOCKED_ROLLBACK_FAILED

red_team.risk: unsigned build confused with releasable artifact
red_team.response: M07 labels unsigned rehearsal-only; L3 sign/notarise/publish remain detached

branch_points.if: signature or Gatekeeper result differs from declared unsigned expectation
fresh non-author verdict is not ACCEPTED

non_claims: no DMG mount or Electron/app launch
future commands are specifications and were not executed
next_dependency: Phill deliberately clears HARD_STOP and separately approves the bounded Mac runtime window; then an empire-mac runner executes this exact plan against a fresh live identity and a fresh non-author reviewer accepts the complete envelope before PR approval.
